title: 🪞 Ego Diffraction Fields
name: Ego Diffraction Fields
what_it_is: Fractal-optic zones that split ego into multiple angular components—each facet acting independently, creating diffraction-induced identity fragments.
how_to_use: her ego hit the field—shattered into colors of self
he argues with himself—and all selves are present
animation_behavior: Self refracts into multiples, each moving differently, light beams pulse in sync with inner emotion ---
